title: デビュー戦の後に・偉大なる1歩

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Nice running, me! I must have captivated over
ten-thousand people with today's performance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can already see it! The swarm of reporters
descending upon me like a meteor shower,
lauding me as best newcomer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, dear reporters, the day is here! Interview me
to your heart's content!
Silence...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What? An empty house? No!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Um... Opera O? Do you have a moment for some
questions?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Only one person?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'm here, too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You looked amazing out there, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And Doto?! It... it wasn't supposed to be like
this...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What on earth is happening here?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not that famous... So, not even the top reporters
of the age have taken notice of my existence?

Hardly any Umamusume become a hot topic right
after their debut.

For the first time, Opera O faces the wall known
as reality...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! That is fine! It only proves I have taken a step forward.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A grand total of zero reporters had ever come to
interview me before today.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But now, zero has become one! That is far more difficult than turning one into ten.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, the curtain has, without a doubt, been
raised for the legend of the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just a small twinkle of my brilliance has been
seen, but I am fully satisfied. Haaah ha ha ha!

She just can't see it. So much for the wall of
reality.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With this spectacular debut under my belt, why
don't we move on toward my next
accomplishment?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, Trainer! What is my next objective?
choice_data_list: Um, the next race goal is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, no. Forget about races for a moment. I want
to focus on increasing the number of reporters I
attract.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must rescue the poor masses stuck in the abyss
of despair that is not knowing my existence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Have you any words of wisdom? How can we go
about attracting more reporters?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Fans?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes... More fans will result in more reporters,
just as more reporters will result in more fans...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What came first, the chicken or the egg? Or was
it me?! I came first, then the egg! It all lines up!

I don't follow, but she seems to accept my
suggestion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is settled. Our first order of business is to
increase my fandom. And to increase fans, one
must...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Race! Join this race and then that race—every
race available, even if it means merely one more
fan!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto! Let us be off! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: C-coming!

Turning on her heel, T.M. Opera O starts walking
to... who knows where.

I guess she's just riding her excitement. Certainly
she'll be waiting for me right outside the venue.
